zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lisours於1097年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親Fulk d' Aulney35歲，母親Adeliza d'Auberville32歲。他於1113年與Albreda de Lacy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1138年登記服兵役。他去世於1193年在他的家鄉享年96歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lisours was born in 1097, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Fulk d' Aulney, was 35 and his mother, Adeliza d'Auberville, was 32. He married Albreda de Lacy in 1113. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1138. He died in 1193, in his hometown, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lisours est né en 1097, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk d' Aulney, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adeliza d'Auberville, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Albreda de Lacy en 1113. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1138. Il est décédé en 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lisours 1097 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk d' Aulney 35 und seine Mutter Adeliza d'Auberville 32. Er hat 1113 Albreda de Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1138 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1193 im Alter von 96 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lisours è nato il nel 1097 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Fulk d' Aulney, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza d'Auberville, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Albreda de Lacy nel 1113. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1138. Morì nel 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Lisoursが1097年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Fulk d' Aulneyは35歳，母Adeliza d'Aubervilleは32歳であった。1113年にAlbreda de Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1138年に兵役登録をした。彼は1193年に故郷で96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lisours(이)가 1097년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk d' Aulney(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza d'Auberville(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1113년 Albreda de Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1193년 그의 고향에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lisours nasceu em 1097, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk d' Aulney, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza d'Auberville, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda de Lacy em 1113. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1138. Ele faleceu em 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lisours родился в 1097 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk d' Aulney было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza d'Auberville, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda de Lacy в 1113 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1138 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1193 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Lisours nació en 1097, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk d' Aulney, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adeliza d'Auberville, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Albreda de Lacy en 1113. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1138. Murió en 1193, en su pueblo, a la edad de 96 años.
